'''wawongo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coachfellow|coachfellow]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-w-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coachfellow|coachfellow]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wawongo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæwengeth|wæwengeth]] || [[word:wæwengej|wæwengej]] || [[word:wæwengesh|wæwengesh]] || [[word:wæwenge|wæwenge]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wawowongoth|wawowongoth]] || [[word:wawowongoj|wawowongoj]] || [[word:wawowongosh|wawowongosh]] || [[word:wawowongo|wawowongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wawongoth|wawongoth]] || [[word:wawongoj|wawongoj]] || [[word:wawongosh|wawongosh]] || [[word:wawongo|wawongo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wawofngoth|wawofngoth]] || [[word:wawofngoj|wawofngoj]] || [[word:wawofngosh|wawofngosh]] || [[word:wawofngof|wawofngof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wawongotho|wawongotho]] || [[word:wawongojo|wawongojo]] || [[word:wawongosho|wawongosho]] || [[word:wawongoko|wawongoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wawongoth|wawongoth]] || [[word:wawongoj|wawongoj]] || [[word:wawongosh|wawongosh]] || [[word:wawongo|wawongo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wawongothol|wawongothol]] || [[word:wawongojol|wawongojol]] || [[word:wawongoshol|wawongoshol]] || [[word:wawongokol|wawongokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wawongothotho|wawongothotho]] || [[word:wawongojojo|wawongojojo]] || [[word:wawongoshosho|wawongoshosho]] || [[word:wawongoko|wawongoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wawongothon|wawongothon]] || [[word:wawongojon|wawongojon]] || [[word:wawongoshon|wawongoshon]] || [[word:wawongokon|wawongokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wawongothoro|wawongothoro]] || [[word:wawongojoro|wawongojoro]] || [[word:wawongoshoro|wawongoshoro]] || [[word:wawongokoro|wawongokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
